entries.current_position: RP-C07 is COMPLETE with AJ-01/AJ-03/AJ-11/AJ-12 UNPROVEN. CAP-011 is RESTORED from a fresh live hosted two-path carrier, exact draft-PR readback, exact-head CI, detached review, merge, and canonical readback. Current capability counts are 12 RESTORED, 7 IMPROVED, 4 PRESERVED, 1 REPLACED, 1 INTENTIONALLY_RETIRED, 0 BLOCKED, and 3 STILL_MISSING. RP-C08 and Repairing Prime remain IN_PROGRESS while the exact remaining route and final-main evidence gates are open.
blockers: CAP-010 lacks a live human-friendly guided Spear intake.
RP-C01-M02, CAP-015, and AJ-01 require a fresh Jayson-started Work/Athena submission with an external origin receipt bound to the hosted event, carrier, mission, run, and draft PR.

RP-C01-M06 protected-path handoff detection is proven, but protected execution was not run.
RP-C01-M07 and AJ-03 lack exact live no-mutation evidence for non-owner, edited input, replay, duplicate branch, and duplicate PR.

CAP-027 remains missing while AJ-01, AJ-03, AJ-11, and AJ-12 are UNPROVEN.
AJ-11 requires clean-clone recovery, deterministic regeneration, rollback classification, and no-Codex-dependency readback at final RP-C08 main.
AJ-12 requires complete Ubuntu and Windows validation at final merged RP-C08 main.
